entries.summary: Task-level drift verification found Phase 1 tasks 1.1 and 1.2 ALIGNED with the implementation: run_baselines.py exposes nl_/sv_/pa_/fq_/hr_ variability features excluding ext_/ix_, preserves B0-B6, and registers B7_v2_plus_variability using V2_PLUS_VAR with predict_b1_v2_only k=500. A verifier NEEDS_REVISION note was caused by req_coverage metadata gap (filesSearched=[] / files_touched empty), not by implementation drift; critic_sounding_board approved treating this as tooling metadata limitation and documenting it in retrospective.
entries.requirementCoverage: Phase 1 scoped requirements covered by implemented artifacts: FR-001/FR-002/FR-003 via reuse of run_baseline_5fold fold loop and predict_b1_v2_only train-fold feature_select; FR-007/FR-009 via B7 selectable baseline using existing full_metrics output path; FR-011 via sensor-derived variability prefixes nl_, sv_, pa_, fq_, hr_; FR-013 via fail-fast cache/column/SID validation; FR-014 via explicit exclusion of ext_ and ix_ clinical/demographic interaction families. Later-phase requirements for remote execution/null validation/confirmation remain pending by plan.
